_note: ARTA case registry for the Mercedes records-refusal saga — the stack's per-case knowledge. Each case is scoped by its CTN SL docket (the reliable key; document_matter_links are catch-alls and must NOT be trusted for per-case membership). Verified against the OSCA / complaint-affidavit definers in the corpus, 2026-06.
complainant: Patricia Keesey Zschoche, represented by Jonathan Paul Zschoche

cases.issue: Refusal to act on building-records / certification inquiries and imposition of an unlawful requirement — the FIRST count.

cases.office: Office of the Municipal Mayor, Mercedes
cases.issue: Refusal of the records request and the SPA-from-all-heirs barrier; non-action on the Road Lot 6 donation.
Failure to perform the ministerial index check for over 35 days and the 'SPA from all heirs' barrier 'prohibited under §21(b)' — the SECOND count.
Administrative inaction / inordinate delay on the tax-record request despite issuing statements over the Treasurer's name.

cases.respondent: TO CONFIRM — LGU / Municipal Engineer's Office (consolidated RTC-level matter)
cases.issue: Consolidated LGU records-refusal arising from the Estate-of-Mary-Worrick information requests. Respondent scope to be confirmed before filing.

cases.office: PENRO — Provincial Environment & Natural Resources Office (DENR), Camarines Norte
cases.issue: Refusal / inaction on survey and boundary-history records; regional escalation against the provincial environment office.
Refusal to release tax declarations / assessment records and imposition of the all-heirs-SPA requirement not in the Citizen's Charter.
Continued refusal on building records — the THIRD count, expressly distinct from 0690 and 0792.

cases.respondent: Mayor Pajarillo and the Sangguniang Bayan members (the elective officials)
cases.office: consolidated — before the Ombudsman / the 6 April 2026 CART
cases.issue: The officials sat on the CART that disposed of the seven complaints against their own offices — conflict of interest / grave misconduct, and the directive barring release of the records.
